description: A quiet, local-first time tracker that watches your work signals so you don't have to.
notes: Cairn is in its first public beta (0.0.X). Windows build is unsigned. Note: Cairn's own docs site (https://cairn.drmowinckels.io/guide/install) hasn't caught up to this release yet and still says no binaries are published — the GitHub release itself is real and current.
